hibernate-mapping.sql-query: IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[ROI_Conversion_Supplemental]') AND type in (N'P', N'PC')) DROP PROCEDURE [dbo].[ROI_Conversion_Supplemental]

SELECT t1.ROI_Supplemental_Seq FROM ROI_Supplemental t1 LEFT JOIN ROI_ConversionStatus_Supplemental t2 on t1.ROI_Supplemental_Seq = t2.ROI_Supplemental_Seq and (t2.Status = 'Completed') where t2.ROI_Supplemental_Seq IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(t1.ROI_Supplemental_Seq) FROM ROI_Supplemental t1 LEFT JOIN ROI_ConversionStatus_Supplemental t2 on t1.ROI_Supplemental_Seq = t2.ROI_Supplemental_Seq and (t2.Status = 'Completed') where t2.ROI_Supplemental_Seq IS NULL
